arcs.title: The Duck Bandit Stirs Again
arcs.summary: Day 3: A third duck appeared at four fifty-three, red, maintaining the established six-inch interval. A coded note — seven characters, method of encoding unknown — was attached to its left foot with twine. The sequence is amber, green, red. Christine has identified it as a system. Steve's unspoken hypothesis was confirmed to his own satisfaction upon seeing the note, but he has still not elaborated. The brass ducks are now facing a direction the household compass does not name. Weasleys' confirmed red exists but declined to say more. The Ministry has somehow obtained a photograph. Day 4 should bring either a partial decode of the note (perhaps one or two characters resolved, pointing somewhere or someone), Steve's hypothesis spoken aloud at last, or a fourth duck — one ahead of the expected sequence — that breaks the pattern in a way that reframes everything that came before. The direction the ducks face, and Lucy's apparent recognition of the code, are both live threads.
